procedures.TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchTransHistory:
create proc [dbo].[TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchTransHistory]		
			@notice_id nvarchar(30),				
			@cur_yyyymmdd nvarchar(8),
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),		
			@communication_cd nvarchar(30),
			@notice_status char(1)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			select count(*) sendable
			from tbl_game_notice_schedule t1, tbl_game_notice_history t2
			where t1.notice_id = t2.notice_id
			and t1.notice_id = @notice_id
			and t1.period_hour = @period_hour
			and t1.period_min = @period_min
			and (t1.communication_cd = @communication_cd OR t1.communication_cd = 'TRA')
			and t1.notice_status = @notice_status
			and convert(nvarchar, t2.regdate, 112) = @cur_yyyymmdd

			set nocount off
			return

CREATE proc [dbo].[TblGameWorldInfoDA_SrchCurWorldInfo]			
			@world_id nvarchar(5)
		as
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
			
			
			SET @sql = ' select world_type as light_char_count, channel_num as dark_char_count , light_users, dark_users, npc_count as total_cnt, npc_count-pc_store_light_users as lobby_cnt, pc_store_light_users as world_cnt,   ' +
					   ' (select sum(pc_store_light_users) from TBL_GAME_WORLD_INFO(nolock) where world_id='''+@world_id+''' and zone_id!=0) sum_pc_store_light_users,  ' +
					   ' (select sum(pc_store_dark_users) from TBL_GAME_WORLD_INFO(nolock) where world_id='''+@world_id+''' and zone_id!=0) sum_pc_store_dark_users,  ' +
					   ' (select sum(npc_count) from TBL_GAME_WORLD_INFO(nolock) where world_id='''+@world_id+''' and zone_id!=0) sum_npc_count  ' +
					   ' from TBL_GAME_WORLD_INFO(nolock)   ' +
					   ' where world_id='''+@world_id+''' and zone_id=0 '
			
			
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			return

procedures.TblLogFilesDA_SrchLogfiles:
CREATE proc   [dbo].[TblLogFilesDA_SrchLogfiles]
			@login_id nvarchar(30),
			@from_date nvarchar(50),
			@to_date nvarchar(50),
			@logfile_type nvarchar(20),			
			@is_shared char(1),
			@is_deleted char(1),
			@top_count nvarchar(5),
			@is_correct nvarchar(10)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
						
			set @sql = ' select top '+@top_count+' logfile_id, logfile_type, logfile_name, logfile_size, logfile_info, is_shared, is_deleted, login_id, convert(nvarchar,regdate,20) regdate ' +
					   ' from TBL_LOG_FILES (nolock)' +
					   ' where regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' '
			
			IF @login_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @is_correct IS NOT NULL
					set @sql = @sql + ' and login_id = '''+@login_id+''''
				ELSE
					set @sql = @sql + ' and login_id like ''%'+@login_id+'%'''
			END
			
			IF @logfile_type IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and logfile_type = '''+@logfile_type+''''
			END
				
			IF @is_shared IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and is_shared = '''+@is_shared+''''				
			END
			
			IF @is_deleted IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and is_deleted = '''+@is_deleted+''''				
			END
						
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by regdate desc '
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.TblMemoDA_SrchAllByRefPKID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblMemoDA_SrchAllByRefPKID]		
			@ref_pk_id nvarchar(30),
			@memo_status char(1),
			@world_id int,
			@memo_type char(1) = 'C'	-- C:캐릭터, L:레기온
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			select t1.char_nm, t1.world_id, t1.memo_id, t1.menu_id, t1.ref_pk_id, t1.memo_info, t1.memo_status, t1.login_id, t3.login_nm, t1.regdate, t2.menu_code
			from tbl_memo t1(nolock), tbl_admin_menu t2(nolock), tbl_admin_user t3(nolock)
			where t1.ref_pk_id=@ref_pk_id
			and t1.login_id = t3.login_id
			and t1.menu_id = t2.menu_id
			and t1.memo_status=@memo_status
			and t1.world_id=@world_id
			and t1.memo_type=@memo_type
			order by t1.memo_id desc
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.TblMyFuncDA_SrchByCond:
CREATE proc   [dbo].[TblMyFuncDA_SrchByCond]			
			@login_id nvarchar(30),
			@login_nm nvarchar(50),			
			@search_auth char(1),
			@view_auth char(1),
			@insert_auth char(1),
			@update_auth char(1),
			@delete_auth char(1),
			@is_correct nvarchar(10)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
						
			set @sql = ' SELECT T2.ADMIN_ID, T2.LOGIN_ID, T2.LOGIN_NM, ' +
					   '	    T1.AUTH_ID, T1.MENU_ID, T1.REG_LOGIN_ID, T1.SEARCH_AUTH, T1.VIEW_AUTH, T1.INSERT_AUTH, T1.UPDATE_AUTH, T1.DELETE_AUTH, T1.IS_DELETED, '+
					   '		T3.MENU_CODE '+
					   ' from TBL_MY_FUNC T1(nolock), TBL_ADMIN_USER T2(nolock), TBL_ADMIN_MENU T3(nolock) ' +
					   ' WHERE	T1.LOGIN_ID = T2.LOGIN_ID AND T1.MENU_ID = T3.MENU_ID '
						
			IF @login_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @is_correct IS NOT NULL
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''''
				ELSE
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.LOGIN_ID like ''%'+@login_id+'%'''
			END
			
			IF @login_nm != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @is_correct IS NOT NULL
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND T2.LOGIN_NM = N'''+@login_nm+''''
				ELSE
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND T2.LOGIN_NM like N''%'+@login_nm+'%'''					
			END
			
			IF @search_auth IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.SEARCH_AUTH = '''+@search_auth+''''				
			END
			
			IF @view_auth IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.view_auth = '''+@view_auth+''''				
			END
			
			IF @insert_auth IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.insert_auth = '''+@insert_auth+''''				
			END
			
			IF @update_auth IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.update_auth = '''+@update_auth+''''				
			END
			
			IF @delete_auth IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND T1.delete_auth = '''+@delete_auth+''''				
			END
				
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.TblMyGroupDA_AuthCheck:
-- exec TblMyGroupDA_AuthCheck @login_id=superuser, @menu_id=10000, @action_code=SEARCH_AUTH		
		create proc [dbo].[TblMyGroupDA_AuthCheck]
		@login_id nvarchar(30),
		@menu_id nvarchar(50),
		@action_code nvarchar(50)
		
		as

		set nocount on
		set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
		set ansi_warnings off

		declare @cond nvarchar(30), @sql nvarchar(1000)

		set @cond = 'T2.' + @action_code

		set @sql= ' SELECT SUM(A.CNT1) MY_AUTH '+
					' FROM '+
					' ( '+
					' 	SELECT COUNT(*) CNT1 '+
					' 		FROM TBL_MY_FUNC(nolock) '+
					' 		WHERE  '+
					'			IS_DELETED = ''Y'' AND '+
					' 			LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''' AND '+
					' 			MENU_ID = '''+@menu_id+''' AND '+
					@action_code + '=''Y'' '+
					' 	UNION '+
					' 		SELECT COUNT(*) CNT1 '+
					' 		FROM TBL_MY_GROUP T1(nolock), TBL_GROUP_FUNC T2(nolock), TBL_ADMIN_GROUP T3(nolock) '+
					' 		WHERE  '+
					' 			T1.LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''' AND '+
					' 			T1.GROUP_ID = T3.GROUP_ID AND T3.IS_DELETED = ''Y'' AND '+
					' 			T1.GROUP_ID = T2.GROUP_ID AND '+
					' 			T2.MENU_ID = '''+@menu_id+''' AND '+
					@cond+'= ''Y'' '+
					' ) A '

		exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
		set nocount off
		return

create proc [dbo].[GM_UserDataDA_SrchAbuseQina]
			@world_id nvarchar(5),
			@user_id nvarchar(30),
			@account_name nvarchar(50),
			@bx_char_id nvarchar(25),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(4000), @tmp int, @sql_etc nvarchar(1000)

			set @sql_etc = ' and delete_type != ''10000'' '

			IF @user_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and user_id = N'''+@user_id+''''				
			END
			
			IF @bx_char_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' and char_id = '''+@bx_char_id+''''				
			END 
			
			IF @account_name != 'null'
			BEGIN
					set @sql_etc = @sql_etc + ' AND account_name = '''+@account_name+''''
			END
									
			set @sql = ' select top ' + @view_count +
					   ' 	delete_type, delete_complete_date, inventory_growth, char_warehouse_growth, delete_date, char_id, user_id, account_id, account_name, org_server, cur_server,	' +
					   ' 	convert(nvarchar,create_date,20 ) create_date, convert(char, gender) gender, convert(char, race) race, convert(char, class) class, convert(char, lev) lev, convert(char, builder) builder, exp, world,	' +					   
					   '   case ' +
					   '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' and last_logout_time > ''2007-12-12 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''#339900'' ' +
				       '     WHEN last_login_time != last_logout_time or last_login_time = ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000''  THEN ''brown'' ' +					  
				       '     WHEN last_login_time = last_logout_time and last_login_time != ''1970-01-01 00:00:00.000'' THEN ''black'' ' +
					   '   end as logonoff, t2.* '+				   
					   ' from user_data t1(nolock), qina_manipulate t2(nolock)' +
					   ' where t1.char_id=t2.charid and t2.qina_id not in(select top ' + @top_count + ' t2.qina_id from user_data t1(nolock), qina_manipulate t2(nolock) where t1.char_id=t2.charid and org_server='''+@world_id+''' ' + @sql_etc + '  order by t2.qina_id desc) '
						
			set @sql = @sql + @sql_etc
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' and org_server = '''+@world_id+''''		
			
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by t2.qina_id desc '
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.GM_UserItemDAO_AddCompound:
create PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_AddCompound]
			@char_id		int
		,	@item_id		bigint -- sub_id
		,	@main_item_dbid bigint
		AS
		SET NOCOUNT ON
		
		begin tran	
		
		-- 주무기가 보조무기로 들어갈 경우 체크 : 현재 합성 주무기가 보조무기로 사용중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where id = @main_item_dbid and main_item_dbid != 0 and char_id = @char_id)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 1
		end		
		
		-- 주무기가 보조무기로 들어갈 경우 체크 : 주무기가 다른 아이템의 보조무기로 사용중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where main_item_dbid = @main_item_dbid and warehouse != 10 and char_id = @char_id)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 2
		end
		
		-- 보조무기가 다른 아이템의 보조무기로 사용 중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where main_item_dbid = @item_id and warehouse != 10 and char_id = @char_id)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 3
		end
		
		
		-- 보조 무기 확인
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where id = @item_id and main_item_dbid != 0 and char_id = @char_id)
			begin
				rollback tran
				return 4
			end
		else
			begin
				update user_item set warehouse = 16, main_item_dbid = @main_item_dbid, update_date=getdate() where id = @item_id and char_id = @char_id
			end
			
		commit tran
		return 0

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_DelCompoundRecovery]
			@char_id		int
		,	@item_id			bigint
		, @warehouse int
		AS
		SET NOCOUNT ON
		declare @main_item_dbid bigint

		begin tran

		select @main_item_dbid = main_item_dbid from user_item(updlock) where id = @item_id and char_id = @char_id
		if (@@rowcount = 0)
		begin
			rollback tran

		end

			update user_item set warehouse = @warehouse where warehouse=17 and id = @item_id and char_id = @char_id

			rollback tran
			return 2
		end

		commit tran
		return 0

procedures.my_workflow_insert:
create proc [dbo].[my_workflow_insert]
			@workflow_cd nvarchar(40)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	

			declare @login_id nvarchar(30)
			declare @organization_id nvarchar(30)
			declare @approval_stage_num int
			declare @is_final nvarchar(3)


			begin
				declare xcur cursor for
					select login_id, organization_id, approval_stage_num, is_final  from TBL_APPROVAL_DEFAULT_STAGE
					group by login_id, organization_id, approval_stage_num, is_final


				open xcur

				fetch next from xcur into @login_id, @organization_id, @approval_stage_num, @is_final
					while @@fetch_status = 0
				
					begin
						insert into TBL_APPROVAL_DEFAULT_STAGE values(@approval_stage_num, @workflow_cd, @login_id, @is_final, @organization_id, @workflow_cd+'_'+@organization_id)

						fetch next from xcur into @login_id, @organization_id, @approval_stage_num, @is_final
					end
				
				close xcur
				deallocate xcur
			end
			
		set nocount off
		return

-- 20120925_GMDB
-- ╝│╣«ID ░╦╗÷
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblPollDA_PollSrch]
			@poll_subject nvarchar(50),	
			@poll_search_id varchar(20),		
			@str_servers nvarchar(100),
			@poll_status nvarchar(5),
			@from_date nvarchar(20),
			@to_date nvarchar(20),
			@is_deleted nvarchar(2)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1500)
			
			set @sql = ' SELECT order_num, race, poll_level, poll_id, poll_title, IS_DELETED, poll_xml_filename, poll_servers, poll_cnt, poll_status, convert(nvarchar,poll_start_date,20) poll_start_date, convert(nvarchar,poll_end_date,20) poll_end_date, convert(nvarchar,regdate,20) regdate ' +
					   ' FROM tbl_poll(nolock) ' +					   
					   ' where IS_DELETED='''+@is_deleted+''' and regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' '
			
			IF @poll_status != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and poll_status='''+@poll_status+'''  '
			END
			
			IF @poll_search_id != ''
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and poll_id='''+@poll_search_id+'''  '
			END
			
			IF @poll_subject != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and poll_title like N''%'+@poll_subject+'%''  '
			END
			
			IF @str_servers != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and poll_servers like ''%'+@str_servers+'%''  '
			END
			
			set @sql = @sql +' order by regdate desc '
			
							
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

			set nocount off
		
			return

			@cycle_min nvarchar(5),
			@max_min nvarchar(5)			
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			
			select t1.poll_id, t1.world_id, t1.pub_status, t1.RS_FILE_NAME, t1.poll_cnt, t1.start_date, t1.end_date, convert(nvarchar,t1.gathering_date,20) gathering_date, t1.regdate

			set nocount off

		as

		set nocount on
		set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
		set ansi_warnings off

		declare @sql nvarchar(1000)

		set @sql = ' select * from ( '+
			' select T1.MENU_ID, T1.MENU_CODE, T1.MENU_DEPTH, T1.MENU_GROUP_CODE, T1.MENU_URL, T1.MENU_TARGET, T1.MENU_IMG '+
			' from TBL_ADMIN_MENU T1, TBL_GROUP_FUNC T2, TBL_ADMIN_GROUP T3, TBL_MY_GROUP T4 '+			
			' where T1.IS_MENU = '''+@is_menu+''' AND '+			
			' (T1.MENU_ID = T2.MENU_ID AND T2.SEARCH_AUTH = ''Y'' ) AND ' +
			' T2.GROUP_ID = T3.GROUP_ID AND ' +
			' T3.GROUP_ID = T4.GROUP_ID AND	' +						
			' T4.LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''' ' + 
			' union ' +
			' select T1.MENU_ID, T1.MENU_CODE, T1.MENU_DEPTH, T1.MENU_GROUP_CODE, T1.MENU_URL, T1.MENU_TARGET, T1.MENU_IMG '+
			' from TBL_ADMIN_MENU T1, TBL_MY_FUNC T5  '+
			' where T1.IS_MENU = '''+@is_menu+''' AND '+	
			' T1.MENU_ID = T5.MENU_ID and T5.LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''' AND T5.SEARCH_AUTH = ''Y'' ) T1 ' +
			' ORDER BY T1.MENU_GROUP_CODE ASC '
		
		exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
		set nocount off
		return

			@login_id nvarchar(30),			
			@is_deleted nvarchar(2),

		as

			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
						
			set @sql = ' SELECT T1.PRESET_ID, T1.PRESET_NM, T1.IS_SHARED, T1.IS_DELETED, convert(nvarchar,T1.regdate,20) regdate, T2.LOGIN_NM, T2.LOGIN_ID, T2.IS_DELETED ' +

			IF @is_deleted IS NOT NULL

			@login_id nvarchar(30),
			@login_nm nvarchar(50),			
			@is_deleted nvarchar(5),
			@is_correct nvarchar(10)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000), @tmp int
						
			set @sql = ' SELECT T1.ADMIN_LEVEL, T2.ORGANIZATION_NM, T2.ORGANIZATION_ID, T1.ADMIN_ID, T1.LOGIN_ID, T1.LOGIN_PW, T1.LOGIN_NM, T1.LOGIN_EMAIL, T1.IS_DELETED, T1.ETC, convert(nvarchar,T1.regdate,20) regdate, convert(nvarchar,T1.AUTH_UPDATE_DATE,20) AUTH_UPDATE_DATE ' +
					' FROM TBL_ADMIN_USER T1(nolock), TBL_ADMIN_ORGANIZATION T2(nolock) ' +
					' WHERE T1.ORGANIZATION_ID = T2.ORGANIZATION_ID  '

			set @tmp = 0
			
			IF @login_id != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @is_correct != 'null'
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_ID = '''+@login_id+''''
				ELSE
					set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_ID like ''%'+@login_id+'%'''
					
				set @tmp = 1
			END
			
			IF @login_nm != 'null'
			BEGIN
				IF @tmp = 1
					IF @is_correct != 'null'
						set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_NM = N'''+@login_nm+''''
					ELSE
						set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_NM like N''%'+@login_nm+'%'''
				ELSE
					BEGIN
						IF @is_correct != 'null'
							set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_NM = N'''+@login_nm+''''
						ELSE
							set @sql = @sql + ' AND LOGIN_NM like N''%'+@login_nm+'%'''
						
						set @tmp = 1
					END
			END
			
			IF @is_deleted != 'null'
			BEGIN					
				set @sql = @sql + ' AND is_deleted = '''+@is_deleted+''''						
			END				
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql

			return

procedures.TblQuestDA_SrchQuest:
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblQuestDA_SrchQuest]	
			@char_nm nvarchar(50),			
			@from_date nvarchar(20),
			@to_date nvarchar(20),
			@world_id nvarchar(3)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1500)
						
			set @sql = ' select t1.quest_pk, t1.quest_req_id, t1.quest_id, t1.quest_status, t1.quest_progress, t1.quest_branch, t1.char_id, t1.char_nm, t1.account_id, t1.request_type, t1.quest_req_info, t1.world_id, t1.communication_cd, convert(nvarchar,t1.regdate,20) regdate ' +					   
					   ' from tbl_quest t1(nolock) ' +					   
					   ' where t1.regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+'''  '
			
			IF @char_nm != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and t1.char_nm=N'''+@char_nm+'''  '
			END

procedures.TblStatisticsScheduleDA_SrchReservedSche:
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblStatisticsScheduleDA_SrchReservedSchedule]
			@current_time nvarchar(30),			
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),			
			@statistics_status char(1)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off			
			
			select *
			from TBL_STATISTICS_SCHEDULE(nolock)
			where ((STATISTICS_TO >= @current_time and STATISTICS_FROM <= @current_time and PERIOD_HOUR = @period_hour AND PERIOD_MIN = @period_min) or (STATISTICS_TO >= @current_time and STATISTICS_FROM <= @current_time and statistics_repeat_min != 0) or (statistics_period = 'ONCE' and task_cd = 'BEF'))						
			AND statistics_status = @statistics_status
			and task_cd != 'TRA'
			order by regdate ASC

			set nocount off
			return

			@statistics_id nvarchar(30),				
			@cur_yyyymmdd nvarchar(8),
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),		
			@task_cd nvarchar(30),
			@statistics_status char(1)
		as

						+ ' , option_count, dye_info, proc_tool_nameid, producer '

						-- [3.5]
						+ ' , STAT_ENCHANT_NAME0, STAT_ENCHANT_NAME1, STAT_ENCHANT_NAME2, STAT_ENCHANT_NAME3, STAT_ENCHANT_NAME4, STAT_ENCHANT_NAME5, isnull(LIMIT_ENCHANT_COUNT,0) as LIMIT_ENCHANT_COUNT '

procedures.TblBuilderCommandScheduleDA_SrchSchedule:
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblBuilderCommandScheduleDA_SrchSchedule]
			@DATE				varchar(20),
			@COMMUNICATION_CD	varchar(5)		= NULL
		AS
		BEGIN
			IF (@COMMUNICATION_CD IS NULL)
			BEGIN
				SELECT	ID, COMMAND_SUBJECT, COMMAND_TEXT, SCHEDULE_TYPE, SCHEDULE_DATE, 
						SCHEDULE_FROM, SCHEDULE_TO, REPEAT_TYPE, REPEAT_PERIOD, 
						COMMUNICATION_CD, STATUS, LOGIN_ID, REGDATE
				FROM	TBL_BUILDER_COMMAND_SCHEDULE (nolock)
				WHERE	SCHEDULE_DATE = CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATE)
				AND		REPEAT_TYPE = 'ONCE'
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				SELECT	ID, COMMAND_SUBJECT, COMMAND_TEXT, SCHEDULE_TYPE, SCHEDULE_DATE, 
						SCHEDULE_FROM, SCHEDULE_TO, REPEAT_TYPE, REPEAT_PERIOD, 
						COMMUNICATION_CD, STATUS, LOGIN_ID, REGDATE
				FROM	TBL_BUILDER_COMMAND_SCHEDULE (nolock)
				WHERE	SCHEDULE_DATE = CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATE)
				AND		COMMUNICATION_CD = @COMMUNICATION_CD
				AND		REPEAT_TYPE = 'ONCE'
			END
		END

CREATE proc [dbo].[TblBuilderCommandScheduleDA_SrchScheduleByDate]
			@DATEFROM			varchar(20),
			@DATETO				varchar(20),
			@COMMUNICATION_CD	varchar(5)		= NULL
		AS
		BEGIN
			IF (@COMMUNICATION_CD IS NULL)
			BEGIN
				SELECT	ID, COMMAND_SUBJECT, COMMAND_TEXT, SCHEDULE_TYPE, SCHEDULE_DATE, 
						SCHEDULE_FROM, SCHEDULE_TO, REPEAT_TYPE, REPEAT_PERIOD, 
						COMMUNICATION_CD, STATUS, LOGIN_ID, REGDATE
				FROM	TBL_BUILDER_COMMAND_SCHEDULE (nolock)
				WHERE	SCHEDULE_DATE BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATEFROM) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATETO)
				ORDER BY ID DESC
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				SELECT	ID, COMMAND_SUBJECT, COMMAND_TEXT, SCHEDULE_TYPE, SCHEDULE_DATE, 
						SCHEDULE_FROM, SCHEDULE_TO, REPEAT_TYPE, REPEAT_PERIOD, 
						COMMUNICATION_CD, STATUS, LOGIN_ID, REGDATE
				FROM	TBL_BUILDER_COMMAND_SCHEDULE (nolock)
				WHERE	SCHEDULE_DATE BETWEEN CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATEFROM) AND CONVERT(DATETIME, @DATETO)
				AND		COMMUNICATION_CD = @COMMUNICATION_CD
				ORDER BY ID DESC
			END
		END

procedures.TblChatSearchHistoryDA_SrchChatHistoryLi:
create proc [dbo].[TblChatSearchHistoryDA_SrchChatHistoryList]
			@chat_target_type nvarchar(4),
			@world_id nvarchar(5),
			@chat_target_user nvarchar(100),
			@chat_reason_list nvarchar(4),
			@log_contents nvarchar(50),
			@chat_is_sent nvarchar(4),
			@from_date nvarchar(20),
			@to_date nvarchar(20),
			@all_servers nvarchar(4),
			@view_count nvarchar(5),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	

			declare @sql nvarchar(1300)
						
			set @sql = ' select top ' + @view_count + ' SRCH_CD, SRCH_INFO,CHAT_SEARCH_HISTORY_ID,WORLD_ID,CHAR_ID,CHAR_NM,ACCOUNT_ID,ACCOUNT_NM,LOGIN_ID,LOGIN_NM,CHAR_EMAIL,IS_SENT,convert(nvarchar,regdate,20) regdate,convert(nvarchar,from_date,20) from_date,convert(nvarchar,to_date,20) to_date ' +
					   ' from TBL_CHAT_SEARCH_HISTORY (nolock)' +
					   ' where chat_search_history_id not in (select top ' + @top_count + ' chat_search_history_id from TBL_CHAT_SEARCH_HISTORY order by chat_search_history_id desc) and regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+'''  '
			
			IF @all_servers = 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( world_id=''' + @world_id + ''') '
			END
			
			IF @chat_reason_list != 'NA'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( srch_cd=''' + @chat_reason_list + ''') '
			END
			
			IF @chat_is_sent != 'NA'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( is_sent=''' + @chat_is_sent + ''') '
			END
			
			IF @chat_target_type = '1' and @chat_target_user != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( account_nm=''' + @chat_target_user + ''') '
			END 
			
			IF @chat_target_type = '2' and @chat_target_user != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( char_nm=''' + @chat_target_user + ''') '
			END 
			
			IF @chat_target_type = '3' and @chat_target_user != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( char_email=''' + @chat_target_user + ''') '
			END 
			
			IF @chat_target_type = '4' and @chat_target_user != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( login_id=''' + @chat_target_user + ''') '
			END 
						
			IF @log_contents != 'null'
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and ( log_contents like ''%'+@log_contents+'%'') '
			END 
			
			set @sql = @sql +' order by chat_search_history_id desc, world_id asc '			
								
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return

procedures.TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchByNoticeID:
CREATE proc [dbo].[TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchByNoticeID]
			@notice_id nvarchar(30)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

procedures.TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchNotices:
CREATE  proc [dbo].[TblGameNoticeScheduleDA_SrchNotices]
			@notice_subject nvarchar(200),
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),	
			@from_date nvarchar(50),
			@to_date nvarchar(50),
			@notice_type char(2),			
			@notice_status char(1),
			@notice_category nvarchar(30),
			@top_count nvarchar(5)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off	
			
			declare @sql nvarchar(1000)
						
			set @sql = ' select top '+@top_count+' notice_pos_type, notice_id, notice_repeat, notice_repeat_min, notice_category, notice_subject, notice_type, convert(nvarchar,notice_from,20) notice_from , convert(nvarchar,notice_to,20) notice_to, notice_period, notice_week, notice_month, period_hour, period_min, communication_cd, notice_count, notice_status, login_id, convert(nvarchar,regdate,20) regdate ' +
					   ' from TBL_GAME_NOTICE_SCHEDULE (nolock)' +
					   ' where regdate between '''+@from_date+''' and '''+@to_date+''' '
			
			IF @period_hour IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and period_hour = '''+@period_hour+''''
			END
			
			IF @period_min IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and period_min = '''+@period_min+''''
			END
						
			IF @notice_subject != 'null'
			BEGIN	
				set @sql = @sql + ' and notice_subject like N''%'+@notice_subject+'%'''
			END
			
			
			
			IF @notice_status IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and notice_status = '''+@notice_status+''''
			END
				
			IF @notice_type IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and notice_type = '''+@notice_type+''''				
			END
			
			IF @notice_category IS NOT NULL
			BEGIN
				set @sql = @sql + ' and notice_category = '''+@notice_category+''''				
			END
						
			set @sql = @sql + ' order by regdate desc '
					
			exec Sp_ExecuteSQL @sql
			
			set nocount off
			return
